scripts.build:full: node scripts/setup-build.js full && npm run build
scripts.build:race: node scripts/setup-build.js race && npm run build
scripts.build:drivers: node scripts/setup-build.js drivers && npm run build
scripts.build:comparisons: node scripts/setup-build.js comparisons && npm run build
scripts.build:constructors: node scripts/setup-build.js constructors && npm run build
scripts.build:seasons: node scripts/setup-build.js seasons && npm run build
scripts.build:records: node scripts/setup-build.js records && npm run build
scripts.build:backlog: node scripts/setup-build.js backlog && npm run build
scripts.build:rankings: node scripts/setup-build.js rankings && npm run build
scripts.build:homepage: node scripts/setup-build.js homepage && npm run build
scripts.race: npm run build:race && npm run deploy
scripts.rankings: npm run build:rankings && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:full: npm run build:full && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: full rebuild" && git push && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:drivers: npm run build:drivers && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: drivers" && git push && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:constructors: npm run build:constructors && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: constructors" && git push && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:comparisons: npm run build:comparisons && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: comparisons" && git push && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:seasons: npm run build:seasons && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: seasons" && git push && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:records: npm run build:records && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: records" && git push && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:backlog: npm run build:backlog && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: backlog" && git push && npm run deploy
scripts.ship:homepage: npm run build:homepage && git add -A && git commit -m "ship: homepage" && git push && npm run deploy
